title: NANA Offices Closed Week of Independence Day
summary: NANA offices in Kotzebue and Anchorage will be closed Monday, June 29 through Friday, July 3. During this time, a small number of employees will be on staff to support operations, and shareholders can request medical and burial assistance by calling (907) 442-3301 or (800) 478-3301 or emailing share...

title: United States Hog Inventory Up 5 Percent
summary: As of June 1, there were 79.6 million hogs and pigs on U.S. farms, up 5 percent from June 2019, and up 3 percent from March 1, 2020, according to the Quarterly Hogs and Pigs report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).
